song.title: The Quiet Hour
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Speak, Lord, in the stillness, While I wait on Thee; Hush my heart to listen, In expectancy.
[V2] 2) Speak, O blessed Master, In this quiet hour; Let me see Thy face, Lord, Feel Thy touch of pow’r.
[V3] 3) For the words Thou speakest, “They are life” indeed; Living bread from heaven, Now my spirit feed!
[V4] 4) All to Thee is yielded, I am not my own; Blissful, glad surrender, I am Thine alone!
[V5] 5) Speak, Thy servant heareth! Be not silent, Lord; Waits my soul upon Thee For the quickening word.
[V6] 6) Fill me with the knowledge Of Thy glorious will; All Thine own good pleasure In Thy child fulfill.
[V7] 7) Like “a watered garden,” Full of fragrance rare, Lingering in Thy presence, Let my life appear.
song.author: Emily M. Grimes
